title: Cinematic Influencer Video Prompt (Text)
promptText: Wide aerial drone shot, camera slowly descends and circles the model, Isabella Roux in a flowing emerald silk gown sashaying across a rooftop helipad at golden hour, Los Angeles skyline in the distance, warm light bathes the scene, subtle lens-flare, photorealistic editorial fashion look, ultra-realistic 8K (cropped for 1080p), shot on ARRI Alexa 65, 24fps, cinematic visual tone.
